articles.description: Coventry City are back in the Premier League after 25 years. Here's how they achieved promotion under the guidance of Frank Lampard.
articles.title: Coventry City: Sky Blues back in the Premier League after a quarter of a century

articles.description: Michael Carrick says there has been no decision made on the Manchester United future of Marcus Rashford, who has spent the season on loan at Barcelona.
articles.title: Manchester United: Michael Carrick leaves door open for Marcus Rashford return

articles.description: George Russell says Formula 1 "would not want to lose" Max Verstappen - but would "understand" if the four-time world champion decided to leave the sport.
articles.title: Formula 1: George Russell 'would understand' if Max Verstappen leaves the sport

articles.description: Bournemouth are close to appointing Marco Rose as Andoni Iraola's replacement as head coach.
articles.title: Bournemouth close to appointing Marco Rose as Andoni Iraola successor

articles.description: Former Arsenal defender Martin Keown pays tribute to his old friend and former Gunners team-mate Alex Manninger, who has died at the age of 48.
articles.title: Alex Manninger: Martin Keown's tribute to 'one of Arsenal's greatest unsung heroes'

articles.description: In 2001, Ronnie O'Sullivan won his first World Snooker Championship. Now, a quarter of a century later, the Rocket is aiming for a record-breaking eighth title.
articles.title: Ronnie O'Sullivan chasing eighth Crucible title at 50 years of age

articles.description: Former Wimbledon champion Marketa Vondrousova is charged with refusing a doping test by the ITIA in an incident the Czech player said happened as she had "reached a breaking point after months of physical and mental stress".
articles.title: Marketa Vondrousova says 'mental and physical stress' led to anti-doping charge

articles.description: A US-based website linked to Todd Boehly is selling Chelsea tickets at inflated prices, leaving the club's fans angry.
articles.title: Chelsea FA Cup semi-final tickets: Todd Boehly linked website selling at inflated prices

articles.description: The Football Supporters' Association says fans are being "fleeced" and "gouged" by the high cost of train tickets to World Cup games in New Jersey.
articles.title: World Cup trains: Fans being 'fleeced' as £111 World Cup train tickets announced

articles.description: Coventry City boss Frank Lampard calls his side's promotion back to the Premier League after 25 years away a "unique" achievement.
articles.title: Frank Lampard: Coventry City boss praises 'special and unique' promotion
